purpose: Catalog of the 24 IDE-related IPC handlers: 9 file-system handlers (read/write/list/rename/etc.), 2 diagnostics handlers, and 13 debug handlers (start, stop, breakpoints, step in/over/out, pause/resume, evaluate, scopes). Documents request/response shapes and security validations.
gotchas: All paths validated against workspace root — escaping via .. is rejected
Debug session is single-instance — calling start while active errors out
File watcher events are debounced — rapid edits coalesce
patterns: Workspace-scoped path validation on every handler
